title: Contraptions o' Plenty
description: A Minecraft Datapack that adds in (5) Brand New redstone components!
body:
This is the Contraptions o' Plenty Datapack!
This Datapack adds in (5) new contraptions with various functions.

(Version 1.1)

- ## The Quarry

This Brand new contraption will mine blocks that are placed in front of it when it has a pickaxe in its gui. If the pickaxe is enchanted with silk touch it will apply the effect onto blocks it breaks.
- ## The Fan

This Block does as it says! when powered with redstone it creates a wind funnel, which pushes items and entities, read more on the in game tutorial!
- ## The Harvester

This block harvests various foliage type blocks that are in front of it when powered, when the block is harvested it will provide different items based on the block that was harvested, read more in-game!
- ## The Heavy Press

This bulky machine presses and crushes different items with the effects of fortune 3, it also crushes different crops allowing you to obtain their seed variants

(Version 1.2)

- ## The Industrial Smelter

This multi-block structure smelts all items at increased Speeds!



- # Crafting Recipes
